{{Quote|Ever since Augwynne, Clan Mother of the Singers, has lost both of her daughters she has 'adopted' two more.|Gethzerion|<ref name="SWGQuest" />}}
'''Kara'Teel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Witch/Legends|witch]] and member of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. She [[Death/Legends|gave her life]] while protecting her mother and [[Coven/Legends|clan]] leader [[Augwynne Djo]] from the machinations of her older sister [[Gethzerion]]. Following the death of Kara'Teel, Augwynne banished Gethzerion and mourned Kara'Teel.

==Biography==
Kara'Teel was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]],<ref name="CTD" /> a [[Coven/Legends|coven]] of [[Witch/Legends|witches]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to<ref name="COPL">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir]].<ref name="COPL" /> A member of the [[Djo family]],<ref name="CTD" /> she<ref name="TDSS" /> was the youngest daughter of the clan's [[Human/Legends|Human]] leader [[Augwynne Djo]] and the younger sister of [[Gethzerion]], [[Barukka]],<ref name="CTD" /> and [[Allaya Djo]].<ref name="COPL" />

Over time, Gethzerion sought to take control of the Singing Mountain Clan<ref name="CTD" /> and allied with the witch [[Baritha]] as part of a plot to [[Death/Legends|kill]] her [[Parent/Legends|mother]].<ref name="TDSS" /> Sometime by [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Death" /> in Gethzerion's attempt to kill Augwynne, Kara'Teel sacrificed herself so that her mother could live. Baritha and Gethzerion were then banished by [[Mother (title)/Legends|Mother]] Augwynne, and the two re-formed the coven of the [[Witches of Dathomir]] known as the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]].<ref name="TDSS" /> Following the death of Allaya in battle,<ref name="COPL" /> Augwynne mourned the loss of two of her daughters, and she adopted two more daughters, [[Aelta]] and [[Chastina]],<ref name="SWGQuest" /> between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].<ref name="SWG date">{{GalaxiesAED}} takes place between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] per the reasoning [[Template:SWG timeline|here]].</ref> Kara'Teel's death at the hand of her sister was mentioned in a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] dossier prepared for [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]].<ref name="CTD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kara'Teel was first mentioned in ''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'', a supplementary reference book to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published in [[1997]].<ref name="CTD" />
